title: Files Should Not Exceed a Certain Length
description: A file that contains too many lines of code can accumulate numerous responsibilities, making it challenging to understand and maintain. It is recommended to refactor large files into smaller ones that focus on specific tasks. This way, the files will be easier to comprehend and test.
recommendation: Refactor the large file into smaller ones, each focusing on a well-defined task. This will make the code easier to understand and test.
impact: Improves maintainability and readability of the code by reducing file complexity and ensuring single responsibility principle.

checks.message: Refactor the large file into smaller ones, each focusing on a well-defined task. This will make the code easier to understand and test.
